vainilla.name: Vanilla Chips
vainilla.description: Classic vanilla cookie filled with Hershey chocolate chips, covered in chocolate ganache and topped with a white chocolate pearl.

chocolate.name: Intense Chocolate
chocolate.description: For chocolate lovers: an elegant cocoa cookie filled with Hershey chocolate chips, covered in chocolate ganache and dusted with cocoa.

red.name: Red Velvet
red.description: Enjoy eternal Christmas with this innovative Red Velvet cookie filled with cranberries and covered with powdered sugar and cranberries.

marmoleada.name: Marbled
marmoleada.description: Enjoy the best of both worlds: vanilla and cocoa with Hershey chocolate chips and a topping of chocolate ganache and pecans.

matcha.name: Matcha
matcha.description: A cookie with intense flavors, made with matcha and filled with white chocolate and coconut, topped with white chocolate and coconut.

oreo.name: Oreo
oreo.description: A classic bakery flavor, a delicious vanilla cookie with Oreo pieces and topped with a whole Oreo cookie.

pop.name: Pop Caramel
pop.description: A burst of flavor: vanilla cookie with cajeta, filled with dark and white chocolate, topped with royal icing and popcorn.

taro.name: Unicorn Taro
taro.description: The unique taste of taro combined with sliced almonds, topped with royal icing and marshmallows.

reyes.name: Kings
reyes.description: This limited–edition cookie adds an innovative touch to our classic cookie by changing the topping to white chocolate and quince paste.

cafe.name: Coffee
cafe.description: An intense, bold–flavored cookie, ideal for those who love starting their mornings with a coffee kick.

rose.name: Rose
rose.description: Our cookie for love and friendship, made with rose water, filled with almonds, and topped with white chocolate and rose petals.

cafe.name: Coffee Cake
cafe.description: Moist and aromatic cake with a deep coffee flavor, filled and covered with a smooth and elegant cream that enhances its toasted notes and fluffy texture.

cocoFrutosRojos.name: Coconut & Red Berries Cake
cocoFrutosRojos.description: Soft and aromatic coconut cake with fresh red berries, filled with buttercream and topped with cream cheese frosting for a perfect balance between freshness and creaminess.

moka.name: Mocha Cake
moka.description: Fluffy mocha cake with cinnamon notes, filled with Moussline mousse and covered with cream cheese frosting, offering a luxurious texture and an intensely balanced flavor.

zanahoria.name: Carrot Cake
zanahoria.description: Moist and spiced carrot cake with toasted nuts, filled and topped with silky cream cheese buttercream that enhances its warm and homemade flavor.

milHojas.name: Mille-Feuille Cake
milHojas.description: Classic mille-feuille cake with crispy puff pastry layers and soft vanilla cream, finished with a delicate dusting of powdered sugar for an elegant and irresistible dessert.

redVelvet.name: Red Velvet Cake
redVelvet.description: Fluffy and vibrant Red Velvet cake with subtle cocoa and vanilla notes, filled and covered with buttercream for a classic, elegant, and irresistible dessert.

malvavisco.name: Marshmallow Cake
malvavisco.description: Soft marshmallow cake with buttercream and crunchy meringues, offering a sweet, fluffy, and visually charming experience in every slice.

sorpresa.name: Surprise Cake
sorpresa.description: Moist and aromatic chocolate cake with a surprise center of candy, filled with Bariloche cream and covered with chocolate buttercream for a fun and delicious experience.

blackAndWhite.name: Dark & White Chocolate Cake
blackAndWhite.description: Elegant white and dark chocolate cake, covered with silky ganache and bitter cacao bites that highlight its sophisticated contrast and deeply balanced flavor.

mazapan.name: Mazapán Cake
mazapan.description: Soft mazapán cake with almond notes, filled and covered with Moussline cream, offering a delicate texture and an irresistible sweet and elegant flavor.

pinkVelvet.name: Pink Velvet Cake
pinkVelvet.description: Aromatic Pink Velvet cake with rose petals, filled with soft buttercream and topped with cream cheese frosting for a delicate, floral, and utterly charming dessert.

pistacheAlmendra.name: Pistachio Almond Date Cake
pistacheAlmendra.description: Healthy pistachio and almond cake, lightly sweet, with notes of cardamom and lemon, ideal with chocolate ganache for a nutritious and elegant dessert.

roscaChocolateNuez.name: Chocolate Nut Bundt Cake
roscaChocolateNuez.description: Moist and aromatic chocolate bundt cake with toasted nuts, perfect on its own or with ganache, offering a perfect balance between crunchy texture and intense flavor.

roscaMarmoleada.name: Marbled Bundt Cake
roscaMarmoleada.description: Fluffy marbled bundt cake with swirls of vanilla and chocolate, with a soft texture and balanced flavor that make it an irresistible and visually charming classic.

roscaNaranja.name: Orange Bundt Cake
roscaNaranja.description: Soft and aromatic orange bundt cake, soaked with citrus syrup that intensifies its freshness and juiciness for a classic, bright, and delicious dessert.

panqueZanahoria.name: Carrot Loaf Cake
panqueZanahoria.description: Soft and aromatic carrot loaf cake made with cream for a deeper and creamier texture, offering a warm, moist, and completely irresistible flavor.

panqueElote.name: Corn Loaf Cake
panqueElote.description: Creamy and aromatic corn loaf cake with tender kernels, cream cheese, and a touch of vanilla, achieving a soft texture and irresistible traditional flavor.

panquePlatanoAvena.name: Banana Oat Loaf Cake
panquePlatanoAvena.description: Soft and nutritious banana loaf cake with oats, nuts, and chocolate chips, offering a warm flavor, moist texture, and a naturally healthy touch.

flanCalabaza.name: Pumpkin Flan
flanCalabaza.description: Creamy and spiced pumpkin flan with a velvety texture and balanced sweetness, enhanced by cream cheese for an elegant and deeply comforting fall dessert.

flanNapolitano.name: Napolitan Flan
flanNapolitano.description: Ultra-creamy Napolitan flan with cream cheese and vanilla, featuring a silky texture and balanced sweetness — a classic, refined, and always irresistible dessert.

carlotaLimon.name: Lemon Carlota
carlotaLimon.description: Creamy and refreshing lemon Carlota, with soft layers and a perfect balance between acidity and sweetness — ideal as a light, chilled, and totally irresistible dessert.

carlotaFresa.name: Strawberry Carlota
carlotaFresa.description: Soft and creamy strawberry Carlota with a fresh fruity flavor and light layers, perfect as a chilled, delicate, and naturally delicious dessert.

pannaCotta.name: Panna Cotta
pannaCotta.description: Soft and silky panna cotta with a delicate vanilla aroma — an elegant, light dessert that stands out for its velvety texture and refined flavor.

tartaSableChocolate.name: Chocolate Sablé Tart
tartaSableChocolate.description: Crispy sablé tart with chocolate topping and Bariloche cream filling, combining textures and an intense, sophisticated flavor in every bite.

tartaSableMango.name: Mango & Fig Sablé Tart
tartaSableMango.description: Crispy sablé tart with sweet mango atop a layer of fig, combining textures and a tropical, sophisticated flavor in every bite.

cremeBrulee.name: Crème Brûlée
cremeBrulee.description: Silky and aromatic crème brûlée with a crisp layer of caramelized sugar that perfectly contrasts its creamy, delicately vanilla interior.

miniPavlova.name: Mini Pavlova
miniPavlova.description: Pavlova with a crispy exterior and soft interior, topped with cream, red berries, and chocolate for a light, sophisticated, and visually charming dessert.

muffinPlatanoZanahoriaChocolate.name: Banana, Carrot & Chocolate Muffin
muffinPlatanoZanahoriaChocolate.description: Nutritious banana and carrot muffin made with healthy flours, naturally sweetened, and filled with chocolate chips for a soft texture and balanced, comforting flavor.

muffinManzanaPlatano.name: Apple & Banana Muffin
muffinManzanaPlatano.description: Soft and aromatic apple and banana muffin, lightly sweetened and made with light flours, resulting in a juicy, spiced, and naturally delicious bite.

muffinFrambuesaArandanoChocolate.name: Raspberry, Blueberry & Chocolate Muffin
muffinFrambuesaArandanoChocolate.description: Juicy muffin with raspberries, blueberries, and chocolate chips, naturally sweetened and made with light flours for a fruity, balanced, and delicious bite.

muffinCrezaYogurt.name: Cherry Yogurt Muffin
muffinCrezaYogurt.description: Soft and juicy cherry muffin with Greek yogurt, offering a delicate and fresh flavor—perfect for those who want a fruity touch in every bite.

muffinChocolate.name: Chocolate Muffin
muffinChocolate.description: Intense, moist, and fluffy chocolate muffin with a deep, enveloping flavor that turns every bite into a true moment of indulgence.

muffinFresa.name: Strawberry Muffin
muffinFresa.description: Fluffy vanilla muffin with yogurt and fresh strawberries, offering a soft and balanced flavor—ideal for those who enjoy a fruity touch in a classic bite.

muffinVainilla.name: Vanilla Muffin
muffinVainilla.description: Soft and fluffy vanilla muffin with a delicate aroma and classic flavor—perfect as a light, versatile, and always irresistible treat.

jellyPop.name: Jelly Pop
jellyPop.description: Irresistible themed and personalized jelly pops with delicious toppings. Perfect for events, gifts, and unique cravings that stand out for their creativity and flavor. (50ml)

jellyPrincess.name: Princess Jelly
jellyPrincess.description: Delicate and magical princess jelly with charming toppings, fully customizable to create the perfect dessert for any royal celebration.

jellyTheme.name: Themed Jelly
jellyTheme.description: Themed jelly adaptable for any occasion, party, or celebration. Customizable in colors, design, and toppings to create the perfect dessert for every moment.

jellyEncapsulated.name: Encapsulated Jelly
jellyEncapsulated.description: Transparent jelly that encapsulates fruits or other edible elements, creating a visually magical, fresh, and delicious dessert in every bite.

jellyLayers.name: Layered Jelly
jellyLayers.description: Layered jelly with vibrant colors and irresistible textures, creating a beautiful, delicious dessert perfect for any occasion.

jellyFruit.name: Fruit Jelly
jellyFruit.description: Fresh, flavorful jellies made with natural fruit, creating a colorful, light, and delicious dessert.

tips.sweetnessDesc: Each cake has its own sweetness level so you can choose exactly what you like.
tips.portionsDesc: Portions designed to share and enjoy.
tips.ingredientsDesc: We make every cake with real butter, fresh eggs, and high-quality ingredients. Everything is homemade — no premixes or shortcuts.
tips.orderDesc: To ensure flavor, texture, and finish, orders must be placed at least 1 day in advance.

contact.title: Cookies for your events
contact.description: We quote special orders for events, corporate gifts, and celebrations. Write to us and let's create something delicious together.

comingSoon.comingDesc: Very soon you’ll find here a new experience crafted with great detail.
